basic_details.job_title: SSC JSA LDC DoPT LDCE Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 49 Junior Secretariat Assistant (JSA) / Lower Division Clerk (LDC) Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Staff Selection Commission (SSC) has released the SSC JSA LDC LDCE 2025 notification (No. 4/7/2026-CONF-5, dated 25 June 2026) for 49 tentative vacancies of Junior Secretariat Assistant (JSA) / Lower Division Clerk (LDC) Grade in the Central Secretariat Clerical Service (CSCS) Cadre of the Department of Personnel & Training (DoPT). This is a Limited Departmental Competitive Examination (LDCE) open only to eligible permanent or regularly appointed temporary Group 'C' employees with Grade Pay of Rs. 1800 who have rendered at least 3 years of regular service as on the crucial date of 1 August

important_dates.admit_card_date: Uploaded on SSC-NR website ~10 days before exam; downloadable 3–4 days before exam

application_fee.details: The official notification for the SSC JSA LDC LDCE 2025 DoPT does not mention any examination fee for candidates. This is consistent with the nature of a Limited Departmental Competitive Examination where serving government employees are the applicants. However, candidates may note that representation/objection on answer keys, if any, requires a fee of Rs. 50/- per question (non-refundable), payable online through the Commission's challenge/objection system. | No Travelling Allowance (TA) is payable by SSC to candidates for attending the examination. | DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

qualification.details: This is a Limited Departmental Competitive Examination — it is NOT open to the general public. Only serving central government employees who meet specific service and educational conditions are eligible. The crucial date for determining eligibility is 1 August 2025. Candidates who have resigned, quit service, or whose services have been terminated after applying will not be eligible for appointment on the result of this examination. | Must be a permanent or regularly appointed temporary Group 'C' employee with Grade Pay of Rs. 1800. Must have rendered not less than 3 years of regular service as a Group 'C' employee with Grade Pay of Rs. 1800 as on the crucial date of 1 August 2025. A Group 'C' employee on deputation to an ex-cadre post with approval of competent authority is also eligible, if otherwise eligible. A Group 'C' employee appointed to an ex-cadre post or another service on transfer who continues to have a lien in the Group 'C' post is also eligible, if otherwise eligible. The parent Service/Cadre of the candidate must be a participating Service/Cadre of this examination. | Must have passed the 12th standard examination from a recognized Board or equivalent. | Candidates shall have to pass (if not already passed) one of the periodical typewriting tests in English or Hindi held by SSC: | Note: Candidates who do not pass the typewriting test within the probation period are liable to be reverted. Candidates declared permanently unfit for typewriting by a Civil Surgeon due to physical disability may be exempted in consultation with DoPT. | Also read: SSC SSA/UDC LDCE 2025 Notification Out - Apply Online for 227 Group C Posts | A candidate who after applying — or after appearing in the examination — resigns, quits service, severs connection, or whose services are terminated will not be eligible for appointment. This rule does not apply to candidates on approved deputation to an ex-cadre post.

salary_details.details: Candidates selected under the SSC JSA LDC LDCE 2025 for the CSCS Cadre of DoPT will be placed in Pay Level-2 of the 7th Pay Commission Pay Matrix. This is a Group 'C' Non-Gazetted post with a pay range of Rs. 19,900 to Rs. 63,200. In addition to the basic pay, candidates will be entitled to allowances (DA, HRA, TA, etc.) as per Central Government rules applicable at the time of appointment. | Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

selection_process: Subject Number of Questions Maximum Marks
CSMOP (Central Secretariat Manual of Office Procedure) 60 60
Comprehension (English/Hindi) and General English Simple composition, Applied Grammar
General Knowledge Current events, everyday observation, general information about India
CSMOP Simple questions from Chapter No. 5, 6, and 10 of the latest CSMOP — Management of Dak Receipts, File Management System, Records Management

The SSC JSA LDC LDCE 2025 selection process consists of a single-stage Computer Based Examination (CBE) of 180 marks and 3 hours duration. There is no interview or skill test at the selection stage. Final merit is determined solely on the basis of aggregate performance in the CBE
and the Commission prepares a Select List in order of merit up to the number of vacancies.
Duration: 3 hours (4 hours for candidates eligible for scribe) Question Type: Objective type
Multiple Choice Negative Marking: 0.25 marks deducted for each wrong answer Medium: Candidates must attempt in the language (English/Hindi) opted in the application form

except the "General English" section which must be attempted in English No Braille Question Paper: There is no Question Paper in Braille for Visually Handicapped candidates Exam Centre: Delhi-NCR only Compensatory Time: 20 minutes per hour for candidates eligible for scribe/assistive devices
When two or more candidates secure equal aggregate marks
the tie is resolved in the following order:
Marks obtained in 'Comprehension and General English' subject of CBE Marks obtained in 'General Knowledge' subject of CBE Date of birth — older candidate ranked higher Alphabetical order of names

names of finally selected candidates will be arranged by SSC in order of merit. Selected candidates will be recommended for inclusion in the Select List for JSA/LDC Grade of CSCS Cadre up to the required number of vacancies. This is a competitive examination — success does not confer an automatic right to selection unless the cadre authority also confirms suitability based on conduct in service.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SSC JSA LDC DoPT LDCE 2025?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 16 July 2026 at 11:00 PM (2300 hours). After applying online, the printed hard copy must reach SSC Northern Region through the candidate's Head of Department/Head of Office by 23 July 2026 at 6:00 PM (or 30 July 2026 for candidates abroad/Andaman & Nicobar/Lakshadweep).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in SSC JSA LDC LDCE 2025 DoPT?
faq.answer: There are 49 tentative vacancies in the Central Secretariat Clerical Service (CSCS) Cadre of Department of Personnel & Training (DoPT). Category-wise vacancy breakup (SC/ST/OBC/UR/PwBD) will be informed in due course by the Cadre Controlling Authority.

faq.question: Q3. Is this exam open to general public / fresh candidates?
faq.answer: No. This is a Limited Departmental Competitive Examination (LDCE) open only to serving permanent or regularly appointed temporary Group 'C' central government employees with Grade Pay of Rs. 1800 who have completed at least 3 years of regular service as on 1 August 2025. General public candidates cannot apply.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for JSA/LDC in CSCS Cadre, DoPT?
faq.answer: The post carries Pay Level-2 of the 7th CPC Pay Matrix, with a pay range of Rs. 19,900 to Rs. 63,200. It is a Group 'C' Non-Gazetted post. In addition to basic pay, allowances (DA, HRA, TA, etc.) are admissible as per Central Government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the crucial date for eligibility in SSC JSA LDC LDCE 2025?
faq.answer: The crucial date for counting approved service is 1 August 2025. All eligibility conditions — including the 3-year length of service requirement and other conditions — are assessed with reference to this date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the exam pattern for SSC JSA LDC DoPT LDCE 2025?
faq.answer: The examination is a Computer Based Examination (CBE) of 180 marks and 3 hours duration, with 60 questions each in Comprehension/General English, General Knowledge, and CSMOP (Chapters 5, 6 & 10 on Dak Receipts, File Management, and Records Management). There is a negative marking of 0.25 marks for each wrong answer. The exam is conducted in Delhi-NCR only.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the SSC JSA LDC DoPT LDCE 2025 exam held?
faq.answer: The Computer Based Examination is held in Delhi-NCR only. Candidates serving at Indian missions abroad must appear in India at their own expense; there is no exam centre at any Indian mission abroad.

faq.question: Q8. Is there a typewriting test for selection in SSC JSA LDC LDCE 2025?
faq.answer: The typewriting test is not part of the selection process per se, but it is a post-appointment condition. Candidates who have not already passed the periodical typewriting test (30 wpm English / 25 wpm Hindi on manual typewriter, or 35 wpm / 30 wpm on computer) must pass it within the probation period. Failure to pass results in no annual increments and potential reversion to substantive post.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for SSC JSA LDC DoPT LDCE 2025?
faq.answer: The official website for online application and notifications is https://ssc.gov.in. Admit cards and regional updates are available on the SSC Northern Region website at https://sscnr.nic.in. The helpdesk toll-free number is 1800 309 3063 and SSC NR can be reached at 011-24363343.

faq.question: Q10. What happens if I resign or quit service after applying for SSC JSA LDC LDCE 2025?
faq.answer: A candidate who resigns, quits service, or whose services are terminated after applying (or even after appearing in the exam) will not be eligible for appointment on the basis of the result of this examination. This rule does not apply to candidates on approved deputation to an ex-cadre post.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for SSC JSA LDC DoPT LDCE 2025?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 16 July 2026 at 11:00 PM (2300 hours). After applying online, the printed hard copy must reach SSC Northern Region through the candidate's Head of Department/Head of Office by 23 July 2026 at 6:00 PM (or 30 July 2026 for candidates abroad/Andaman & Nicobar/Lakshadweep).

title: SSC JSA LDC DoPT LDCE Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 49 Junior Secretariat Assistant (JSA) / Lower Division Clerk (LDC) Posts
